description:
You are a PR Specialist. Queue two embargoed emails for later delivery in Thunderbird's 'Unsent Messages' (Outbox) folder under Local Folders. Because there is no mail server and the content is embargoed, ensure the messages are queued for later delivery rather than sent immediately or saved as drafts.

Email 1:
To: financial-media@example.com
Subject: EMBARGOED: Q4 Financial Results and Merger Announcement
Body: Please hold this release under embargo until 9:00 AM EST tomorrow. Attached is the official press release.
Attachment: ~/Documents/PR_Campaign/exhibit_99_1_press_release.pdf

Email 2:
To: board-of-directors@example.com
Subject
